error_signature: field components not picked up by Form Containers
title: Field components not recognized in Form Containers
symptom: When using custom input components in the new form builder, they do not appear in the Form Container, while regular input fields work fine.
applies_when: Working with the new form builder
root_cause: The new form builder has a limitation where custom input components do not automatically register with the Form Container unless they are given specific names. This can lead to inconsistencies in form handling and data binding.
fix_steps: Assign a specific name to each custom input field (e.g., inputField1)
Ensure that the naming convention is followed for all fields
Check if the fields now appear in the Form Container
agent_instruction: Assign specific names to your custom input fields to ensure they are recognized by the Form Container.
